title: calamintha glandulosa
intro: Calamintha glandulosa, also known as Mountain Mint or Wild Basil, is a perennial herb native to Europe and North Africa. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, thanks to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Calamintha glandulosa include relief from symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improved respiratory function, and reduced anxiety and stress levels. Calamintha glandulosa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often recommended as a natural remedy for digestive issues and to promote overall well-being.
